name: O'Reilly Automotive
analysis: It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $89.5500, stop $83.9124, target $100.6300 (1.97:1) — then trail it.
